use_cases: Display audio waveform visualization in podcast players or music apps
Show voice recording amplitude in text-to-speech applications
Render AI-generated audio output in ElevenLabs-style interfaces
Interactive audio scrubbing with click-to-seek functionality
Real-time audio visualization in web-based audio editors
ai_summary: A canvas-based waveform visualization component that renders audio amplitude data as vertical bars with configurable styling including width, gap, radius, and color. Features fade edge effects, responsive resizing via ResizeObserver, and click interaction support for bar selection. Designed for audio-focused applications requiring real-time or pre-rendered waveform display.
